summary: Software engineer focused on building reliable backend systems, automation workflows, and AI-powered products that improve speed, quality, and developer productivity.
bio: Software engineer with 4+ years of experience designing scalable backend systems, automation platforms, and AI-enabled tools for cloud, telecom, and enterprise environments.
I enjoy turning complex requirements into practical, production-ready solutions using Python, APIs, data pipelines, and thoughtful engineering practices.
My work spans system design, workflow optimization, experimentation, and collaboration across engineering and product teams.
